type_definitions.name: Identifier
type_definitions.description: Common base newtype for Rust identifier validation: non-empty, no leading digit, ASCII alphanumeric+underscore only. Shared validation base for TypeName, TraitName, FieldName, MethodName, ParamName, VariantName, CrateName, FunctionName (ADR 1 D5).

type_definitions.name: TypeName
type_definitions.description: Newtype around Identifier for type short names (last segment, no '::' separator). BTreeMap key in CatalogueDocument::types map (ADR 1 D5 / D11).

type_definitions.name: TraitName
type_definitions.description: Newtype around Identifier for trait short names. BTreeMap key in CatalogueDocument::traits map (ADR 1 D5 / D11).

type_definitions.name: FieldName
type_definitions.description: Newtype around Identifier for struct field names used in FieldDecl (ADR 1 D5).

type_definitions.name: MethodName
type_definitions.description: Newtype around Identifier for method names in MethodDeclaration and CompositePattern::TypestateState::transition_methods (ADR 1 D5 / D3).

type_definitions.name: ParamName
type_definitions.description: Newtype around Identifier for function/method parameter names in ParamDeclaration (ADR 1 D5).

type_definitions.name: VariantName
type_definitions.description: Newtype around Identifier for enum variant names in VariantDecl (ADR 1 D5).

type_definitions.name: CrateName
type_definitions.description: Newtype around Identifier for crate names. Used in FunctionPath::crate_name and TraitImplDeclV2::origin_crate (ADR 1 D5 / D10).

type_definitions.name: FunctionName
type_definitions.description: Newtype around Identifier for function names in FunctionPath (ADR 1 D5 / D11).

type_definitions.name: ModulePath
type_definitions.description: Newtype wrapping Vec<Identifier> for module path segment lists. serde default = empty vec (= crate root). Used in TypeEntry, TraitEntry, FunctionPath (ADR 1 D5 / D7).

type_definitions.name: TypeRef
type_definitions.description: Newtype wrapping String for generics-inclusive type reference strings (e.g. 'Result<Option<User>, DomainError>', 'std::HashMap<String, u32>', 'domain_core::UserId'). Allows angle brackets, commas, and '::' for crate-prefixed cross-crate references (ADR 2 D11). Distinct from Identifier (ADR 1 D5).

type_definitions.name: FunctionPath
type_definitions.description: Full-path key for FunctionEntry BTreeMap: crate_name + module_path (serde default=empty) + name. Cross-workspace functions use crate name prefix directly (no '::' prefix; no 'crate::' prefix) per ADR 1 D11.

type_definitions.name: IdentifierError
type_definitions.description: Error type for Identifier and all newtype wrappers around it. 4 variants: Empty (identifier string was empty) / InvalidCharacters(String) (contains chars outside ASCII alphanumeric+underscore or starts with digit) / InvalidSegment(String) (module path segment invalid) / InvalidFunctionPath(String) (FunctionPath string format invalid) (ADR 1 D5).

type_definitions.name: DataRole
type_definitions.description: Role enum for TypeEntry (struct / enum / type alias). 13 values: ValueObject / Entity / AggregateRoot / DomainService / Specification / Factory / UseCase / Interactor / Command / Query / Dto / ErrorType / SecondaryAdapter. TypeEntry only accepts DataRole; ContractRole on TypeEntry is a parse-time type error (ADR 1 D2).

type_definitions.name: ContractRole
type_definitions.description: Role enum for TraitEntry. 3 values: SpecificationPort / ApplicationService / SecondaryPort. Attaching ContractRole to TypeEntry is a parse-time type error (ADR 1 D2).

type_definitions.name: FunctionRole
type_definitions.description: Role enum for FunctionEntry. 2 values: FreeFunction / UseCaseFunction (ADR 1 D2).

type_definitions.name: ItemAction
type_definitions.description: Action for each catalogue entry. 4 values: Add / Modify / Reference / Delete. Replaces TypeAction. Serde default = Add. Inherit semantics from TDDD-03 (ADR 1 D4).

type_definitions.name: SelfReceiver
type_definitions.description: Enum for MethodDeclaration receiver. 3 values: Owned (self) / SharedRef (&self) / ExclusiveRef (&mut self). Option<SelfReceiver> = None means associated function (no self receiver) (ADR 1 D8).

type_definitions.name: CompositePattern
type_definitions.description: Pattern for TypeKind::Struct (ADR 1 D3 / D7). 3 variants: Plain (no special pattern) / TypestateState { of: TypeName, transition_methods: Vec<MethodName> } (typestate state with transition method references) / Newtype { inner: TypeRef } (newtype wrapper). Struct payload encodes Pattern x Kind constraint at schema level.

type_definitions.name: VariantPayload
type_definitions.description: Payload for VariantDecl. 3 variants: Unit (no payload, serde default) / Tuple(Vec<TypeRef>) (unnamed field list) / Struct(Vec<FieldDecl>) (named field list). Supersedes EnumVariantDeclaration::payload_types Vec<String> (ADR 1 D12). Serde default = Unit when payload field is omitted.

type_definitions.name: TypeKindV2
type_definitions.description: Language-level kind for TypeEntry (new name to avoid collision with domain::schema::TypeKind being deleted). 3 variants payload-encoded: Struct { pattern: CompositePattern, fields: Vec<FieldDecl> } / Enum { variants: Vec<VariantDecl> } / TypeAlias { target: TypeRef }. Struct is the only variant that carries CompositePattern (ADR 1 D3 / D7).

informal_grounds.summary: Named TypeKindV2 in catalogue to avoid name collision with domain::schema::TypeKind (declared as delete below). In implementation the module separation (tddd::catalogue vs schema) disambiguates; the catalogue uses short names as keys so both would appear as TypeKind. This suffix avoids the collision at the catalogue level.

type_definitions.name: FieldDecl
type_definitions.description: Struct field declaration: name (FieldName) and type (TypeRef). Used in TypeKindV2::Struct::fields and VariantPayload::Struct (ADR 1 D7).

type_definitions.name: VariantDecl
type_definitions.description: Enum variant declaration: name (VariantName) and payload (VariantPayload, serde default = Unit). Replaces EnumVariantDeclaration (ADR 1 D12).

type_definitions.name: TraitImplDeclV2
type_definitions.description: New trait implementation declaration: trait identity only (trait_name: TraitName, origin_crate: CrateName). No methods field — trait/impl signature alignment delegated to Rust compiler (ADR 1 D10). Replaces old TraitImplDecl.

type_definitions.name: TypeEntry
type_definitions.description: Entry in CatalogueDocument::types BTreeMap. Fields: action (ItemAction), role (DataRole), kind (TypeKindV2), methods (Vec<MethodDeclaration>), trait_impls (Vec<TraitImplDeclV2>), module_path (ModulePath, serde default=empty), docs (Option<String>). TypeEntry only accepts DataRole (ADR 1 D7).

type_definitions.name: TraitEntry
type_definitions.description: Entry in CatalogueDocument::traits BTreeMap. Fields: action (ItemAction), role (ContractRole), methods (Vec<MethodDeclaration>), module_path (ModulePath, serde default=empty), docs (Option<String>) (ADR 1 D7).

type_definitions.name: FunctionEntry
type_definitions.description: Entry in CatalogueDocument::functions BTreeMap. Fields: action (ItemAction), role (FunctionRole), params (Vec<ParamDeclaration>), returns (TypeRef), is_async (bool), docs (Option<String>) (ADR 1 D7).

type_definitions.name: CatalogueDocument
type_definitions.description: New top-level catalogue document schema. Fields: schema_version (u32), crate_name (CrateName), layer (LayerId), types (BTreeMap<TypeName,TypeEntry>), traits (BTreeMap<TraitName,TraitEntry>), functions (BTreeMap<FunctionPath,FunctionEntry>). 1 file = 1 crate = 1 layer (ADR 1 D1 / D6). crate_name validated against filename <crate_name>-types.json. layer uses LayerId newtype (architecture-rules.json driven, ADR 2026-04-17-1528-tddd-contract-map §D1).

type_definitions.name: CatalogueDocumentError
type_definitions.description: Error for CatalogueDocument validation: CrateNameMismatch (filename vs crate_name field) / DuplicateTypeName / DuplicateTraitName / DuplicateFunctionPath / InvalidIdentifier (ADR 1 D6).

type_definitions.name: ExtendedCrate
type_definitions.description: TypeGraph A / S: rustdoc_types::Crate extended with per-Item action. Private fields krate (Crate) and item_actions (BTreeMap<Id, ItemAction>) are accessed via constructor + accessor methods (no public fields). B / C / D are pure rustdoc_types::Crate (no wrapper needed). (ADR 2 D2).

type_definitions.name: Phase1Error
type_definitions.description: Error for Phase 1 S/D construction. Variants: ActionContradiction (add with existing B / modify|reference|delete without B) / UnresolvedTypeRef (closed-world check failure) / DanglingId (dangling Id after unresolved marker resolution) (ADR 3 D2).

type_definitions.name: SignalRegion
type_definitions.description: Enum encoding 12 variants representing the evaluation regions from ADR 3 D3 Phase 2 3-way table (11 logical rows; the 'S∩C+Match' row is split into Add and Modify variants): SIntersectC_Match_Add / SIntersectC_Match_Modify / SIntersectC_Match_Reference / SIntersectC_Mismatch_Reference / SIntersectC_Mismatch_Add / SIntersectC_Mismatch_Modify / SMinusC_Reference / SMinusC_Add / SMinusC_Modify / DIntersectC / DMinusC / CMinusSUnionD.

type_definitions.name: ThreeWaySignalKind
type_definitions.description: Signal kind for Phase 2 3-way evaluation result. 4 values: Skip / Blue / Yellow / Red (ADR 3 D3).

type_definitions.name: ThreeWaySignal
type_definitions.description: Signal result for one item in Phase 2 3-way evaluation. Fields: item_name (String), region (SignalRegion), signal (ThreeWaySignalKind). All fields are private; type existence check only.

type_definitions.name: ThreeWayEvaluationReport
type_definitions.description: Report produced by Phase 2. Contains Vec<ThreeWaySignal> for evaluated items that yield a non-skip signal (Blue / Yellow / Red); S ∩ C 構造一致 + action=Reference items are omitted (skip, ADR 3 D3). Replaces ConsistencyReport for the new 3-way evaluator path. Field signals is private; type existence check only.

type_definitions.name: NewTypeGraphCodecError
type_definitions.description: Error type for Catalogue -> ExtendedCrate (TypeGraph A) codec. Variants: InvalidTypeRef(String) (syn parse failure on TypeRef string, carries human-readable description) / AmbiguousTypeName(String) (short name collision within the same catalogue, carries the conflicting short name). Crate-prefixed TypeRef values are never rejected as errors — they are auto-collected into external_crates (ADR 2 D5 / D11). (ADR 2 D9).

type_definitions.name: CatalogueToExtendedCratePort
type_definitions.description: Secondary port for Catalogue -> ExtendedCrate (TypeGraph A) conversion. Declared in domain; implemented by CatalogueToExtendedCrateCodec in infrastructure (ADR 2 D8).

type_definitions.name: SignalEvaluatorPort
type_definitions.description: Secondary port for 3-way signal evaluator (Phase 1 + Phase 2). Inputs: A (ExtendedCrate) + B (Crate) + C (Crate). Output: ThreeWayEvaluationReport or Phase1Error. Declared in domain (ADR 3 D5).

type_definitions.name: TypeDefinitionKind
type_definitions.description: Old single-enum 15-variant TypeDefinitionKind (domain::tddd::catalogue). Deleted as replaced by the 3-axis separation: DataRole + ContractRole + FunctionRole + TypeKindV2 in CatalogueDocument (ADR 1 D1). New schema uses TypeEntry/TraitEntry/FunctionEntry with separate role/kind fields.

type_definitions.name: TypeCatalogueDocument
type_definitions.description: Old top-level catalogue document (schema_version + entries: Vec<TypeCatalogueEntry>). Deleted as replaced by CatalogueDocument (3-BTreeMap new schema) (ADR 1 D1 / D6).

type_definitions.name: TypeCatalogueEntry
type_definitions.description: Old per-entry record (name + description + kind: TypeDefinitionKind + action: TypeAction + approved + spec_refs + informal_grounds). Deleted as replaced by TypeEntry / TraitEntry / FunctionEntry (ADR 1 D1).

type_definitions.name: TypeBaseline
type_definitions.description: Old TypeBaseline (HashMap-based, domain::tddd::baseline). Deleted as baseline is now stored as rustdoc_types::Crate JSON (B = pure rustdoc_types::Crate) (ADR 2 D2).

type_definitions.name: TypeBaselineEntry
type_definitions.description: Old TypeBaselineEntry (domain::tddd::baseline). Deleted together with TypeBaseline.

type_definitions.name: TraitBaselineEntry
type_definitions.description: Old TraitBaselineEntry (domain::tddd::baseline). Deleted together with TypeBaseline.

type_definitions.name: FunctionBaselineEntry
type_definitions.description: Old FunctionBaselineEntry (domain::tddd::baseline). Deleted together with TypeBaseline.

type_definitions.name: TraitImplBaselineEntry
type_definitions.description: Old TraitImplBaselineEntry (domain::tddd::baseline). Deleted together with TypeBaseline.

type_definitions.name: TypeGraph
type_definitions.description: Old TypeGraph (domain::schema, HashMap-based TypeNode/TraitNode/FunctionNode). Deleted as replaced by rustdoc_types::Crate-based ExtendedCrate (ADR 2 D1).

type_definitions.name: TypeNode
type_definitions.description: Old TypeNode (domain::schema). Deleted together with TypeGraph (ADR 2 D1).

type_definitions.name: TraitNode
type_definitions.description: Old TraitNode (domain::schema). Deleted together with TypeGraph (ADR 2 D1).

type_definitions.name: FunctionNode
type_definitions.description: Old FunctionNode (domain::schema). Deleted together with TypeGraph (ADR 2 D1).

type_definitions.name: EnumVariantDeclaration
type_definitions.description: Old EnumVariantDeclaration with payload_types: Vec<String> (domain::tddd::catalogue). Deleted as superseded by VariantDecl + VariantPayload (ADR 1 D12).

type_definitions.name: MemberDeclaration
type_definitions.description: Old MemberDeclaration enum (Field / Variant). Deleted as replaced by FieldDecl and VariantDecl as separate types with distinct, typed payloads (ADR 1 D1 / CN-09).

type_definitions.name: TypeAction
type_definitions.description: Old TypeAction enum (Add / Modify / Reference / Delete). Deleted as replaced by ItemAction (same 4 values, renamed per ADR 1 D4).

type_definitions.name: TypestateTransitions
type_definitions.description: Old TypestateTransitions enum (Terminal / To(Vec<String>)). Deleted as replaced by CompositePattern::TypestateState { of, transition_methods } (ADR 1 D3).

type_definitions.name: TraitImplDecl
type_definitions.description: Old TraitImplDecl carrying expected_methods: Vec<MethodDeclaration>. Deleted as replaced by TraitImplDeclV2 (trait identity only: trait_name + origin_crate, no methods field per ADR 1 D10).

type_definitions.name: ParamDeclaration
type_definitions.description: Existing ParamDeclaration (raw String fields). Modified to use newtype-wrapped fields (ParamName / TypeRef) aligned to ADR 1 D5 newtype system.

type_definitions.name: MethodDeclaration
type_definitions.description: Existing MethodDeclaration. Modified to use SelfReceiver enum for receiver (ADR 1 D8) and add docs: Option<String> field (ADR 1 D9).

type_definitions.name: ConsistencyReport
type_definitions.description: Existing ConsistencyReport (domain::tddd::consistency). Referenced for transition period — will be superseded by ThreeWayEvaluationReport once the new signal evaluator is complete (IN-14).

type_definitions.name: ContractMapWriter
type_definitions.description: Existing secondary_port for persisting contract-map content. Referenced to expose implements edge for FsContractMapWriter in infrastructure — not modified in this track.

informal_grounds.summary: R7 declare obligation: FsContractMapWriter implements ContractMapWriter; port must be declared in catalogue for implements edge visibility.

type_definitions.name: CatalogueLinter
type_definitions.description: Secondary_port for running catalogue lint rules. Modified in T008 to update the `catalogue` parameter from the deleted `TypeCatalogueDocument` to the new `CatalogueDocument` (ADR 1 D1). The implements edge for InMemoryCatalogueLinter in infrastructure is preserved.

informal_grounds.summary: R7 declare obligation: InMemoryCatalogueLinter implements CatalogueLinter; port must be declared in catalogue for implements edge visibility. Modified in T008 as TypeCatalogueDocument is deleted.

type_definitions.name: SchemaExporter
type_definitions.description: Existing secondary_port for extracting public API of a crate as SchemaExport. Referenced to expose implements edge for RustdocSchemaExporter in infrastructure — not modified in this track.

informal_grounds.summary: R7 declare obligation: RustdocSchemaExporter implements SchemaExporter; port must be declared in catalogue for implements edge visibility.
